chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 322 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution reference application as office objections No.2, 8, 15, 18, 20 & 25 not complied with since 15.08.2018 20.01.2026 Dr. Imtiaz Ali advocate holds brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2018 remains listed for orders as to non- prosecution. On 02.04.2018, 07.02.2019, 28.11.2019 and 01.12.2020, time was sought. Same appears to be the same today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
